chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 5798 of 2025 [Mrs. Mahnaz Hadi v. FOP & others] Petitioner: Mrs. Mahnaz Hadi through Ms. Neha Asif, Advocate. Respondent 1: Federation of Pakistan through Ms. Mehreen Ebrahim, DAG. Respondents 1-6: Nemo. Date of hearing: 11-12-2025 Date of decision: 11-12-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Counsel for the Petitioner files statement that the Commissioner, Inland Revenue Appeals (V) has been appointed; that the matter was heard by him and is presently reserved for an order. In this view of the matter, purpose of the petition stands served. Petition disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
